subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Thy letter was received, and a brief reply is now being written. There is no opportunity for lengthy exposition [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه شما رسید مختصرا جواب مرقوم میشود فرصت تطویل نیست هر
subcodes.subjects: @methods of teaching the Cause, @materialism; material vs. spiritual civilization
